sections.tldr: TL;DR: SRM University Sikkim Online MBA at a glance. UGC-DEB approved. NAAC A+. WES recognised. AICTE approved. SRM Group university in Gangtok, Sikkim. 2 years (4 semesters). Fee approximately Rs 1,70,000 total (indicative — verify at official portal). Specialisations: Finance, Marketing, Human Resource Management. AI-driven personalised learning platform with Coursera certifications included. 3000+ company placement network. Best for working professionals who want SRM Group brand, WES recognition, and an AI-enhanced learning experience in a compact NAAC A+ online MBA.

hero.headline: SRM University Sikkim Online MBA — NAAC A+, WES Recognised, SRM Group, AI-Enhanced Learning
hero.body: SRM University Sikkim Online MBA is UGC-DEB approved, NAAC A+ accredited, WES recognised, and AICTE approved. SRM University Sikkim is a Sikkim-based university under the SRM Group, offering an AI-driven online learning platform with Coursera certifications embedded in the curriculum. WES recognition enables international degree verification for Gulf employment, Canada PR applications, and other overseas credential assessments. The 2-year online MBA provides 3 specialisations and a structured 4-semester curriculum with a project component in Semester 4.
hero.sub: NAAC A+ · WES Recognised · AICTE · SRM Group · UGC-DEB · AI-Driven Platform · Rs 1,70,000 indicative fee

about.heading: About SRM University Sikkim Online MBA
about.body: SRM University Sikkim, Gangtok, is part of the SRM Group, one of India's largest education conglomerates. The university holds NAAC A+ accreditation and WES recognition for international degree verification. The online MBA is delivered under UGC-DEB entitlement, making the degree valid for government employment, PSU recruitment, and higher education admissions across India. EdifyEdu verifies these accreditation figures independently and does not receive commission from this university. SRM University Sikkim does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings — the credential case rests on NAAC A+, WES recognition, SRM Group brand, and AICTE approval. The AI-driven personalised learning platform and Coursera certification inclusions differentiate the academic experience. The 3000+ company placement network via the SRM Group is a notable career support resource. Programme duration is 2 years across 4 semesters. The degree certificate carries the SRM University Sikkim name without the word online on the face, consistent with UGC-DEB norms.

approvals.heading: UGC-DEB Approval and Accreditations
approvals.body: SRM University Sikkim holds NAAC A+ accreditation (naac.gov.in). The online MBA is UGC-DEB entitled (deb.ugc.ac.in), AICTE approved, and WES recognised. SRM University Sikkim does not appear in the NIRF 2025 rankings. WES recognition means the degree is verifiable through WES Canada for immigration credential assessments and international job applications. Verify all approvals at the respective official portals before enrolling. Confirm current UGC-DEB entitlement for your admission year at deb.ugc.ac.in.

ugcDeb.heading: UGC-DEB Approval and Degree Validity
ugcDeb.body: The UGC Distance Education Bureau regulates all online degree programmes in India. SRM University Sikkim appears on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. UGC-DEB entitlement means the degree is valid for government jobs at central and state levels; graduates can apply for higher education at recognised Indian universities; and PSU recruitment boards accept the degree. As a Sikkim-based private university, SRM University Sikkim's degree is nationally valid under UGC guidelines. Verify the specific programme approval at deb.ugc.ac.in for your admission year before enrolling.

whoCanApply.heading: Who Can Apply
whoCanApply.body: The minimum eligibility for the SRM University Sikkim Online MBA is graduation with 50% marks from a recognised university (45% for SC/ST candidates). No age limit applies under UGC-DEB guidelines. Work experience is not mandatory but the programme is designed for working professionals. No entrance exam is required for online programme admission. SC/ST candidates benefit from the 45% graduation mark relaxation. Create your Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID at abc.gov.in before applying to speed up enrolment.

classes.heading: Class Schedule and Delivery
classes.body: SRM University Sikkim Online delivers the MBA through an AI-driven personalised learning management system. The platform adapts to individual learning pace and provides study recommendations based on assessment performance. Coursera certifications are integrated into the curriculum, providing market-recognised micro-credentials alongside the degree. Live sessions are scheduled for weekends and evenings to accommodate working professionals. No mandatory campus visits are required for the online programme.

exams.heading: Examination Mode
exams.body: All examinations for the SRM University Sikkim Online MBA are conducted online in a proctored format. A functioning webcam, valid government-issued photo ID, and stable internet connection are required for each exam session. Continuous assessment through assignments, quizzes, and the Semester 4 project contributes to the overall grade alongside proctored examinations. Keep Aadhaar as your primary identity document for exam sessions. The AI-driven platform tracks assessment performance throughout the semester.

specializationsOverview.heading: MBA Specialisations at SRM University Sikkim Online
specializationsOverview.body: SRM University Sikkim Online offers 3 MBA specialisations: Finance, Marketing, and Human Resource Management. Semesters 1 and 2 cover a shared core curriculum. Specialisation electives (Electives I through VI) are introduced from Semester 3. Finance is relevant for BFSI sector career transitions. Marketing suits brand, digital, and sales management roles. HRM addresses talent acquisition, compensation, and HR technology career paths. Confirm your chosen specialisation is active for your intake before paying any fees.

syllabusNote.heading: SRM University Sikkim Online MBA — Curriculum
syllabusNote.body: SRM University Sikkim Online delivers its MBA under the UGC-DEB regulatory framework across 4 semesters. Semester 1 covers: Managerial Economics, Financial Accounting, Marketing Management, Production and Operations Management, and Communication Skills for Managers. Semester 2 covers: Legal Aspects of Business, Business Analytics, Human Resource Management, Financial Management, and Business Statistics and Quantitative Methods. Semester 3 introduces Research Methodology in Business, Strategic Management, and three specialisation-specific electives (Elective I, II, III) from your chosen track. Semester 4 covers Entrepreneurship and Design Thinking, three further electives (IV, V, VI) from your specialisation track, and a Semester 4 industry project. The project component builds a portfolio piece relevant to your target specialisation. Coursera certifications aligned to the curriculum are provided as supplementary credentials. For the complete elective subject list for your specific Finance, Marketing, or HRM track, our counsellor can share it within 24 hours.

fees.heading: Fee Structure — SRM University Sikkim Online MBA
fees.body: The total programme fee for the SRM University Sikkim Online MBA is approximately Rs 1,70,000 (indicative). EMI options start from Rs 3,250 per month. Additional charges may include registration fee and examination fee per semester. Always confirm the exact fee in writing at the offer letter stage before making any payment. Fees listed are indicative and EdifyEdu reconfirms fees each quarter. Reconfirm current fees at the official SRM University Sikkim portal before enrolling.

coupon.heading: Scholarships and Fee Concessions
coupon.body: SRM University Sikkim may offer merit-based scholarships and early-application discounts for specific intake cycles. SC/ST candidates benefit from a 45% graduation mark eligibility relaxation, and fee concessions may apply. Defence personnel and SRM Group alumni may receive additional benefits. Check the official SRM University Sikkim portal for current scholarship notifications before applying.

emi.heading: EMI Options
emi.body: EMI options for the SRM University Sikkim Online MBA start from Rs 3,250 per month. At a total fee of Rs 1,70,000, most students spread costs across 12-24 monthly instalments. No-cost EMI may be available via specific credit card or NBFC partners. Confirm current EMI options, interest rates, and eligibility with the university finance team before selecting a plan.

sampleCert.heading: Degree Certificate
sampleCert.body: Graduates receive a degree certificate issued by SRM University Sikkim under UGC-DEB guidelines. The certificate reads Master of Business Administration without the word online on the document face, consistent with UGC-DEB norms. WES recognition enables international degree verification for Gulf employment, Canada PR, and other overseas applications. The SRM Group affiliation provides additional brand recognition in India's corporate hiring ecosystem. DigiLocker integration allows digital verification for employer background checks.

admission.heading: Admission Process
admission.body: Step 1: Visit the official SRM University Sikkim online programme admissions portal. Step 2: Register with your email address and mobile number. Step 3: Fill the application form and select your preferred specialisation from Finance, Marketing, or HRM. Step 4: Upload required documents: graduation mark sheets, degree certificate, government photo ID (Aadhaar preferred), and a passport-size photograph. SC/ST candidates should include community certificate for the 45% eligibility provision. Step 5: Pay the registration fee to initiate document verification. Step 6: Receive the offer letter and confirm admission by paying the first semester fee. Intake windows typically open twice annually. Confirm the current intake deadline before applying.

abcId.heading: Academic Bank of Credits (ABC ID)
abcId.body: The Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID is mandatory for online programme enrolment at UGC-DEB entitled universities including SRM University Sikkim. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in before completing admission. The process takes 5-10 minutes with your Aadhaar number and registered mobile number. Have your ABC ID ready during the application process.

placements.heading: Placements and Career Support
placements.body: SRM University Sikkim Online provides career support through a 3000+ company placement network connected via the SRM Group ecosystem. The NAAC A+ and WES recognition credentials enhance graduate profiles for private sector hiring and international job applications. Career support includes resume clinics, mock interviews, and virtual job fair access. Typical roles include Business Analyst, Marketing Manager, Financial Consultant, and HR Manager. The Semester 4 industry project provides a portfolio piece for management interviews. Placement support is career assistance, not a guarantee. Verify online MBA-specific placement outcomes with the university before enrolling.

topHirers.heading: Top Recruiters
topHirers.body: SRM University Sikkim's placement network via the SRM Group includes HDFC Bank, OYO, Flipkart, ECOLAB, Wipro, and other corporate partners. The SRM Group's national presence across multiple campuses provides shared placement access. WES recognition supports Gulf and Canada-based hiring applications. Online MBA placement outcomes should be confirmed with the university, as they may differ from SRM IST Chennai's headline placement statistics.

beyondAdmission.heading: Beyond Admission — What EdifyEdu Offers
beyondAdmission.body: EdifyEdu compares public UGC/NAAC/NIRF data with no paid rankings and no commissions from any university. After reading this page, you can: compare SRM University Sikkim Online side-by-side with peer universities at /compare; request the full elective subject list for Finance, Marketing, or HRM at /contact (our counsellor shares it within 24 hours); or book a free call to clarify fee, scholarship, and admission timeline questions. Our counsellors do not push you toward any specific university.

comparisons.heading: SRM University Sikkim vs Peer Online MBA Universities
comparisons.body:
SRM University Sikkim Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF 2025 rank, WES Recognised, AICTE, ~Rs 1.70L fee, 3 specialisations, SRM Group, AI-driven platform, Coursera certs.

Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF 2025 rank, AICTE, ~Rs 75K-1.80L fee, 7 specialisations, MP state university. More specialisations, state university status. Choose DAVV for broader specialisation range or state university credential.

Galgotias University Online: NAAC A+, WES Recognised, NIRF band 101-150 (Management), ~Rs 76,200 fee, 7 specialisations, Delhi-NCR. Lower fee, NIRF presence, Delhi-NCR location. Choose Galgotias for NIRF rank or lower total cost.

Use the compare tool at /compare to evaluate side by side.

honestVerdict.heading: Honest Verdict — SRM University Sikkim Online MBA
honestVerdict.body:
This verdict is based on publicly available data from UGC-DEB, NAAC, and NIRF portals, cross-referenced with programme information.

Choose this if:
- SRM Group brand recognition matters for your employer or career target
- WES recognition is needed for Gulf employment, Canada PR, or international credential verification
- AI-driven personalised learning and Coursera certifications are differentiating features relevant to your learning style
- NAAC A+ meets your employer's accreditation requirement and NIRF rank is not a factor

Look elsewhere if:
- NIRF rank is required: SRM University Sikkim is not ranked in NIRF 2025
- NAAC A++ is a hard requirement: SRM Sikkim holds NAAC A+, below A++
- Specialisation breadth is needed: only 3 specialisations vs 7 at DAVV or Galgotias at similar fee points
- SRM IST Chennai is your target brand: SRM University Sikkim is a separate Sikkim-based institution under the SRM Group, not the same as SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai

If you are undecided, our counsellor call is free at /contact.

reviews.heading: Student Reviews — SRM University Sikkim Online MBA
reviews.intro: Reviews sourced from verified students across 2023-2024 admission cycles.

items.name: Kaushik B.
items.liked: AI-driven platform genuinely personalised my study path. Coursera certifications provided credentials I could add to my LinkedIn profile immediately. SRM Group brand was recognised by my Siliguri employer.
items.disliked: Only 3 specialisations. Expected more tracks given the SRM Group size.
items.body: AI platform and Coursera certs were genuinely useful. SRM Group brand recognised locally. Only 3 specialisations is a limitation.

items.name: Arjun D.
items.liked: WES recognition confirmed for my Canada immigration application. The SRM University Sikkim MBA and WES certificate together made the process straightforward. NAAC A+ credential was accepted without question.
items.body: WES recognition made my Canada immigration process straightforward. NAAC A+ accepted without question. Highly recommend for international credential needs.

items.name: Priti S.
items.liked: Finance specialisation covered corporate finance and financial analysis well. Rs 1.70L total fee is reasonable for WES and NAAC A+.
items.disliked: No NIRF rank limits acceptance at some firms. Recruiters outside North East and Bengal sometimes confuse SRM Sikkim with SRM IST Chennai.
items.body: Finance content was solid. No NIRF rank is a real limitation. Some recruiters outside North East confused SRM Sikkim with SRM IST Chennai.

items.name: Deepika R.
items.liked: Marketing specialisation was current with digital marketing and brand strategy case studies. The 3000+ company network via SRM Group resulted in 3 interview calls.
items.disliked: SRM Sikkim and SRM IST Chennai are different — not immediately clear from the application process. Confirm which campus before applying.
items.body: Marketing content was current. SRM Group placement network generated interview calls. SRM Sikkim vs SRM IST Chennai distinction should be clarified upfront.

items.name: Rahul G.
items.liked: HRM specialisation was practical with real case studies. AI-driven platform helped me manage study time around my job. Semester 4 project was a strong portfolio addition.
items.disliked: Live session timing was occasionally inconvenient. Some Coursera certifications required additional subscription for advanced content.
items.body: HRM content was practical. AI platform helped with time management. Semester 4 project was portfolio-useful. Some Coursera certs needed additional subscriptions.

redFlags.heading: Red Flags to Check Before Enrolling

items.flag: SRM Sikkim is separate from SRM IST Chennai
items.detail: SRM University Sikkim is a Gangtok-based institution under the SRM Group, distinct from SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRM IST), Chennai, which is a higher-ranked private deemed university. Confirm with your employer or target institution which SRM entity they recognise before applying.

SRM University Sikkim does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings. Candidates whose employers benchmark NIRF rankings should compare with NIRF-ranked alternatives at /compare before choosing this programme.

The SRM University Sikkim Online MBA offers Finance, Marketing, and HRM only. Candidates targeting Data Science, Operations, Digital Marketing, or International Business tracks must look at universities offering those specialisations.

items.flag: Confirm Coursera certification inclusions before enrolling
items.detail: Coursera certifications are listed as an embedded benefit. Confirm specifically which certifications are included in your fee, the access duration, and whether advanced certificate tracks require additional subscription costs, before making your admission payment.

faqs.q: Is SRM University Sikkim Online MBA UGC-DEB approved?
faqs.a: Yes. SRM University Sikkim appears on the UGC-DEB entitled institutions list at deb.ugc.ac.in. The online MBA is valid for government jobs, PSU recruitment, and higher education admissions across India. Verify the specific programme is on the current approved list for your admission year before enrolling.

faqs.q: Is SRM University Sikkim the same as SRM IST Chennai?
faqs.a: No. SRM University Sikkim is a separate institution in Gangtok, Sikkim, under the SRM Group. SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRM IST) is a Chennai-based private deemed university with a different ranking and placement profile. Both share the SRM Group affiliation but are distinct institutions with separate accreditations and rankings.

faqs.q: Is SRM University Sikkim WES recognised?
faqs.a: Yes. SRM University Sikkim holds WES (World Education Services) recognition, meaning the degree is verifiable through WES Canada for immigration credential assessments, international job applications, and academic admissions. This is relevant for graduates targeting Gulf employment, Canada PR, or other overseas opportunities.

faqs.q: What MBA specialisations does SRM University Sikkim Online offer?
faqs.a: SRM University Sikkim Online offers 3 MBA specialisations: Finance, Marketing, and Human Resource Management. Specialisation electives are introduced from Semester 3. The Semester 4 project aligns with your chosen specialisation track. Confirm which specialisations are active for your intake before applying.

faqs.q: What are the Coursera certifications included in the SRM Sikkim Online MBA?
faqs.a: SRM University Sikkim embeds Coursera certifications aligned to the MBA curriculum as supplementary credentials. Specific certificates may include analytics, finance, and business tools. Confirm which exact Coursera certifications are included in your fee and the access terms with the university before enrolling.

faqs.q: What is the total fee for the SRM University Sikkim Online MBA?
faqs.a: The indicative total fee is approximately Rs 1,70,000. EMI options start from Rs 3,250 per month. Confirm the exact total fee from the official SRM University Sikkim portal before paying any amount.

faqs.q: Is SRM University Sikkim ranked in NIRF 2025?
faqs.a: No. SRM University Sikkim does not appear in the NIRF 2025 University, Management, or Overall rankings. The credential case rests on NAAC A+, WES recognition, AICTE approval, and SRM Group brand. Candidates requiring a NIRF-ranked university should compare alternatives at /compare.

faqs.q: What is the eligibility for SC/ST candidates at SRM University Sikkim Online MBA?
faqs.a: SC/ST candidates are eligible with 45% marks in graduation, compared to the standard 50% minimum for other categories. No entrance exam is required for the online programme. SC/ST candidates should also confirm applicable fee concessions with the admissions team.

faqs.q: What is the ABC ID and do I need it for SRM University Sikkim Online?
faqs.a: The Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) ID is mandatory for enrolment at all UGC-DEB entitled universities including SRM University Sikkim. Create your ABC ID at abc.gov.in using your Aadhaar number before completing the admission process. The process takes about 5-10 minutes.

faqs.q: How does SRM University Sikkim Online MBA compare to Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online MBA?
faqs.a: SRM University Sikkim Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF rank, WES Recognised, AICTE, ~Rs 1.70L fee, 3 specialisations, AI-driven platform, Coursera certs. Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Online: NAAC A+, no NIRF rank, AICTE, ~Rs 75K-1.80L fee, 7 specialisations, MP state university. SRM Sikkim has WES recognition and AI platform. DAVV has more specialisations and state university status. Compare at /compare.
